title: Deep RL: DQN, policy gradients, PPO, GRPO
focus: Replay buffer; clipped surrogate; DeepSeek-R1's GRPO.

items.label: Count Good Nodes IN Binary Tree
interviewQuestions: Compare BFS vs DFS for this problem — which fits, and what's the iterative version?
What's the recursion's space cost on the stack, and how would you go iterative if you needed O(log n)?
What's the relationship between this problem's invariant and the BST property (if any)?

items.label: DQN: experience replay, target nets
interviewQuestions: Why does DQN need experience replay and a target network?
What does Double DQN fix that vanilla DQN gets wrong, and why does it matter in practice?

items.label: Policy gradients & REINFORCE
interviewQuestions: Walk through the policy gradient theorem.
Why are baselines used (e.g., advantage estimation)?

items.label: Actor-critic, PPO, GRPO
interviewQuestions: Walk me through PPO — what's the clipped surrogate objective and why does it stabilize training?
How is GRPO (used in DeepSeek-R1) different from PPO?
